## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] CI / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed (even in tests)
- [ ] No new `eval()`, `exec()`, `subprocess` calls without input sanitisation
- [ ] Environment variables used for all external service config — nothing hardcoded
- [ ] If this adds a new dependency: `pip-audit` run locally shows no known CVEs
- [ ] If this changes workspace execution: workspace runs as non-root, no `--privileged`

## Test coverage

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated (if touches Daytona lifecycle)
- [ ] Manually tested against a real Daytona workspace (if applicable)
